title: Codex review verdict
description: The machine-readable verdict Codex emits as its final message for each review round. Drives the convergence loop.

decision.description: APPROVE = converged (blocking_issues must be empty). REVISE = at least one blocking issue, iterate. REJECT = fundamental flaw iteration won't fix, escalate to human.

blocking_issues.description: Issues that MUST be fixed before approval. Empty iff decision is APPROVE.

id.description: Stable short id, e.g. B1, B2.

location.description: Where in the artifact (section/file/line), if applicable.

non_blocking_suggestions.description: Nice-to-haves that do not block approval.

addressed_previous.description: IDs of prior-round blocking issues the reviewer judges resolved this round. Used for oscillation/regression detection.
